title: init/scaffold verb (was jssm#625)
manager: An `init` verb that scaffolds a new FSL project — starter machine, config, and the wiring to render and test it — so a newcomer goes from empty directory to working setup in one command. Scaffolding is the difference between 'FSL is a library I have to assemble' and 'FSL is a tool I can start with', and it retires the pile of stale template-repo issues.
